Chronology of every recorded fact about [[King Regent]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== The Captain ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 6''' — The King Regent authorized the Karoshan commander to use a wand.}}

== The Knight ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 13''' — Drones in the sky could belong to the King Regent.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 26''' — King Felrex is a monarch who will watch the duel.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 29''' — King Felrex is the King of Karosha.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 37''' — King Regent Felrex was a candidate for selection by Horizon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 38''' — King Regent Felrex intends to stall the D’Niss to build an army of Perfected.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 39''' — King Felrex is a figure whom Varic Vallenar and his crew pose a threat to.}}

== The Pilot ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 16''' — King Regent Felrex is a mutual enemy of the Captain and Solstice.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 20''' — King Regent Felrex is a top Perfected leader who may be waiting with the Karoshan fleet.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 27''' — The King Regent is the ruler being opposed by the Rebel Queen.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
